description: Originally set to release in 2020, Malaysia's first competent sports car has as much caucasian DNA as Alex Yoong and performance figures that can change Jeremy Clarkson's mind about Malaysian cars. Many interior parts and even the engine come from FCA, however FCA has no presence in Malaysia so all is fine. It's 2023 now, I wonder how the people at Bufori are doing...
creator: Keanny
